mitigations:
E-Series SANtricity OS Controller Software:
Ensure that SSH remains disabled (the default).
products: Management Services for Element Software and NetApp HCI
NetApp SolidFire & HCI Storage Node (Element Software)

title: CVE-2002-20001 Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Protocol Vulnerability in NetApp Products
